card_description: Joe Chip is a fictional character referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 3 Exegesis passages. First appears in *UBIK*. Context: "The author writes to Claudia, interpreting the "decay backward of forms" seen by the character Joe Chip in the novel *UBIK* as movement along the "orthogonal" axis of time."
